camera.title: Camera Access Needed
camera.message: To record video or take photos, this app needs access to your camera and microphone.

microphone.title: Microphone Access Needed
microphone.message: Voice memos need microphone access. You can enable it in your device settings.

photoLibrary.title: Photo Library Access Needed
photoLibrary.message: Please allow photo library access in your device settings to select photos.

videoLibrary.title: Photo Library Access Needed
videoLibrary.message: Please allow photo library access in your device settings to select videos.

location.title: Location Access Needed
location.message: This feature needs location access. You can enable it in your device settings.
